mapper.sql: select title_id, user_id, title_type, title_name, tax_no, is_default, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from jst_invoice_title
mapper.insert:
insert into jst_invoice_title (user_id, title_type, title_name, tax_no, is_default, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{userId}, #{titleType}, #{titleName}, #{taxNo},
#{isDefault} 0 , #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
#{delFlag} '0' )
mapper.update:
update jst_invoice_title
title_type = #{titleType}, title_name = #{titleName}, tax_no = #{taxNo}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where title_id = #{titleId} and del_flag = '0'
update jst_invoice_title set is_default = 0, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = '0' and is_default = 1
